query:
ALTER TABLE customers 
ADD COLUMN onsiteRateCurrency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR' NOT NULL AFTER onsiteRate,
ADD COLUMN remoteRateCurrency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR' NOT NULL AFTER remoteRate,
ADD COLUMN kmRateCurrency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR' NOT NULL AFTER kmRate,
ADD COLUMN mealRateCurrency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR' NOT NULL AFTER mealRate;
